title: Job Interview
prompt: You are in a job interview. The interviewer says: Tell me a little about yourself and why you want this role.
objective: Introduce yourself and give a reason for applying

title: Café Order
prompt: You walk into a coffee shop. The barista says: Hi there, what can I get for you today?
objective: Successfully order a drink and ask for the price

title: Airport Check-In
prompt: You are at an airport check-in desk. The agent says: Good morning, can I see your passport and booking reference?
objective: Check in for your flight and ask about your seat

title: Team Standup
prompt: You are in a work meeting. Your manager says: Okay, your turn — what did you work on yesterday and what are you doing today?
objective: Give a clear standup update with yesterday and today's work

title: Meeting Someone New
prompt: You are at a networking event. Someone walks up and says: Hey, I don't think we've met — I'm Alex. What brings you here?
objective: Introduce yourself and start a short conversation

title: Making a Complaint
prompt: You are at a hotel front desk. You say to the receptionist that your room has a problem. The receptionist replies: I'm sorry to hear that. Can you describe the issue?
objective: Clearly explain the problem and request a solution
